full_text:
Bu Jing (Xuanfeng) 卜靜 (玄風)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bu Jing (卜靜), styledXuanfeng (玄風), was born in Wu. Widely admired, he became a magistrate of Kuaiji under Sun Quan. Bu Jing was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
